channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: TypeScript 5.8 reaches general availability
item.description: Microsoft’s TypeScript 5.8, the latest version of the company’s strongly typed superset of JavaScript, has reached general availability (GA).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: This waterproof tablet can do something no Apple iPad can, make calls on any one of two SIM cards - and it is cheap as chips
item.description: The BMAX MaxPad I10 S Pro is a rugged tablet with dual SIM support, full mobile connectivity, and waterproofing - all for less than $200.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Ulefone Unveils Armor 28 Ultra: A Rugged Android Smartphone with High-End Performance
item.description: Meet the Armor 28 Ultra, a rugged Android smartphone designed to deliver high-end performance in a durable body. Equipped with a MediaTek Dimensity 9300+ chipset and a massive 10,600mAh battery, this device is perfect for extreme conditions.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Hegseth halts cyber operations against Russia: Reports
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has halted offensive cyber operations against Russia, according to media reports. The Pentagon chief ordered U.S. Cyber Command to pause offensive operations last week, CNN and NBC reported. The move comes amid what appears to be a broader shift in U.S.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: The trailer for Doctor Who's new season promises new mysteries, creepy cartoons and musical madness
item.description: New trailer for Doctor Who on BBC One and Disney Plus introduces new companion alongside time and space madness.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: TSMC will invest $100B in US chip manufacturing
item.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) plans to invest $100 billion to build chip manufacturing plants in the U.S., President Trump announced Monday. The multibillion-dollar investment, first reported by The Wall Street Journal, will stretch out over the next four years.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Melania Trump says it's 'heartbreaking' to watch teens grapple with the fallout from revenge porn
item.description: Melania Trump says it’s “heartbreaking” to see teens and especially girls grapple with the fallout after they’re targeted by malicious and sexually explicit online content.
item.dc:creator: Darlene Superville, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tim Cook says there's something in the AIR this week, and it might just be the rumored MacBook Air with the M4 chip
item.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook has taken to X (formerly Twitter) to tease that 'There's something in the Air' this week, and it might just be the rumored MacBook Air with the M4 chip or an upgraded iPad Air.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Americans split over Musk, federal workforce cuts: Survey
item.description: Americans in a new survey are split over their views of Elon Musk and his Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), as well as federal workforce cuts during the opening weeks of the second Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: TikTok Under Investigation for Teen Data Use
item.description: UK data protection watchdog investigates TikTok's use of personal information from teenagers, raising concerns about recommendation algorithms and potential harm to young users.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: It looks like Microsoft might have broken Windows 11 24H2 again as performance plummets with Intel's latest CPUs
item.description: The latest version of Windows 11 has had some problems with slowing down and even crashing, according to some users.
item.dc:creator: alekshamcloughlin@outlook.com (Aleksha McLoughlin), TechRadar

item.title: Lenovo's latest iteration of popular Yoga laptop range comes with exceptional tandem OLED tech
item.description: Lenovo adds two Intel-powered laptops to its Aura Edition Yoga range, and refreshes the AMD-powered Yoga Pro 7.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: The 8 new rules of IT leadership
item.description: The CIO role continues to evolve, changing as dramatically as the technology it manages and maintains. Moreover, the pace of the chief IT position’s transformation seems to be accelerating — likewise mirroring the speed of change in the tech stack.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Who needs Google technology? Probably not you
item.description: Clearly Google is doing something right. Although Google Cloud’s revenue still lags AWS and Microsoft Azure, it’s growing much faster (albeit on a smaller base). But that’s not the real story of its growth. The story is that it’s growing at all.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How eBPF is changing container networking
item.description: “No man is an island,” wrote John Donne. But containers certainly are. They are created as islands in and of themselves, packaged with all they need to operate independently—code, dependencies, and runtime. This autonomy is great for security but not so great for networking.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Everything you need to know about the Oscars’ AI controversy
item.description: Sometimes, authenticity can be a film’s most special effect. It took months for Best Actress front-runner Mikey Madison to learn how to pole dance like the titular exotic dancer in Anora and for her fellow nominee Timothée Chalamet to passably play guitar as Bob Dylan in A Complete Unknown.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Private lunar lander Blue Ghost aces moon touchdown with a special delivery for NASA
item.description: A private lunar lander has touched down on the moon, delivering a drill and other experiments for NASA.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: White House to host first Crypto summit
item.description: The White House is set to welcome professionals in the cryptocurrency industry on March 7 for a first-of-its-kind summit.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Curious about DeepSeek but worried about privacy? These apps let you use an LLM without the internet
item.description: Most of us are used to using internet chatbots like ChatGPT and DeepSeek in one of two ways: via a web browser or via their dedicated smartphone apps. There are two drawbacks to this. First, their use requires an internet connection.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Soft robotic prosthetic hand uses nerve signals for more natural control
item.description: Researchers unveiled a new soft prosthetic hand that combines the natural coordination patterns of our fingers with the decoding of motoneuron activity in the spinal column.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011, which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Federal Executive Forum Artificial Intelligence Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2025
item.description: How are agencies refining their AI strategy? The post Federal Executive Forum Artificial Intelligence Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Gabbard decries Britain's reported demand for Apple to provide backdoor access to users' cloud data
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard says she has serious concerns about the British government's reported demand that Apple provide backdoor access to any data stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Nvidia sales surge in the fourth quarter on demand for AI chips
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Nvidia on Wednesday reported a surge in fourth-quarter profit and sales as demand for its specialized Blackwell chips, which power artificial intelligence systems, continued to grow, sending the company's stock higher after hours. For the three months that ended Jan.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man who said he was upset with Musk and Trump charged with threatening to burn down xAI facility
item.description: ASHLAND CITY, Tenn. (AP) — A Tennessee man has been charged with an act of terrorism after he threatened to burn down an xAI facility because he was upset with its founder, Elon Musk, and President Donald Trump, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: AI, automation spur efforts to upskill network pros
item.description: Networking skills are evolving to keep pace with broader technology trends, and network pros need to proactively develop new competencies in areas such as AI and automation to stay relevant.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Precise asset management leads to impactful zero trust initiatives
item.description: Agencies’ attention and efforts are now shifting towards strengthening cybersecurity defenses to address the more challenging aspects of cyber threats. The post Precise asset management leads to impactful zero trust initiatives first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: I’m a tech expert. These are the 5 time-saving tech tips I tell everyone
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson presents five secret shortcuts: Adjust sound/vibration, share YouTube moments, fix tabs and tweak brightness.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
